ObjectStates.Name: BlockTriangle
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
ImageURL = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17711549262018015394/7180F55196798D60BB71FDFF1BCA7CCFA06D5E65/'
NameText = ''

function onLoad(state)
    self.addContextMenuItem('텍스트 입력', enterText)
    self.addContextMenuItem('이미지URL 입력', enterImage)
    local s = JSON.decode(state)
    if s ~= nil then
        if s.url ~= nil then
            ImageURL = s.url
        end
        if s.text ~= nil then
            NameText = s.text
        end
    end
    setImage(ImageURL)
    setText(NameText)
end

function onSave()
    local s = {url = ImageURL, text = NameText}
    return JSON.encode(s)
end

function enterText(color, pos, obj)
    Player[color].showInputDialog("텍스트 입력", 
        function(text, pColor)
            NameText = text
            setText(NameText)
        end
    )
end

function enterImage(color, pos, obj)
    Player[color].showInputDialog("이미지URL 입력", 
        function(text, pColor)
            ImageURL = text
            setImage(ImageURL)
        end
    )
end

function setText(input)
    self.UI.setValue('nametext1', input)
    self.UI.setValue('nametext2', input)
end

function setImage(input)
    self.UI.setAttribute('bgimage1', 'image', input)
    self.UI.setAttribute('bgimage2', 'image', input)
end
